fields.title: Update TaskRegistry to load agent definitions from .md files
fields.description:
Refactor TaskRegistry to discover and load agent .md files.

## Changes
1. Add AgentRegistry class (or merge into TaskRegistry)
2. Discover .md files from:
   - extensions/tau/agents/*.md (bundled)
   - ~/.pi/agent/agents/*.md (user)
   - .pi/agents/*.md (project)
3. builtins() returns agent names, loads definitions on demand
4. resolve() loads full AgentDefinition

## API
- get(name: string): AgentDefinition | undefined
- list(): AgentDefinition[]
- resolve(name: string, complexity: Complexity): ResolvedPolicy (includes systemPrompt)
fields.close_reason: Created AgentRegistry class that discovers and loads agent definitions from .md files (extension/user/project search paths).
